scripts.local:stack:remote: concurrently -n api,idx,exp,dash -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w server" "npm run indexer -w server" "npm run explorer:dev" "npm run dashboard:dev"
scripts.local:deploy: npm run deploy:local:full -w contracts && npm run fund:treasury -w contracts
scripts.local:prepare: npm run server:db:generate && npm run server:db:push
scripts.local:bootstrap: npm install && npm run local:prepare && npm run contracts:compile
scripts.local:stack: concurrently -n api,idx,exp,dash -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w server" "npm run indexer -w server" "npm run explorer:dev" "npm run dashboard:dev"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w apps/dashboard && npm run build -w apps/explorer && npm run build -w apps/website
